parameters: Except for certain events in this game, while you're
separated from Lalana, her character sprite will
always be displayed on the right side of the screen.
If you don't want to always keep track of Lalana's
status, please set it to be hidden.

Are you finished with your preparations, \n[1]\n[2]?
Yeah. Seems like everyone's left already.
Shall we go find some work too?

\n[1]\n[2] can be careless at times, so I'll
support you to the best of my abilities!
From here on, you are completely free to act.
Help the townspeople, increase your reputation,
and if you meet with the Duke, the game will end.
You can accept requests from townspeople by talking to
NPCs with the HELP icon. The conditions for their
occurrence may vary depending on the time of day and
whether or not you are with Lalana.
Also, there are cases where your reputation will
increase without you having to do anything. Once your
reputation reaches 15 or higher, you can go to the
Duke's mansion from the north side of the central area.
There are no time limits or game overs,
but please be aware that it will affect the ending.
Generally, the date will advance by one day when
events occur or when you rest in bed.
You can save the game and review events in your
room's diary. Additionally, you can change settings
by examining the dresser in your room.
